query: SELECT pc.id as cat_id, pc.name as cat_name, p.id as prod_id, p.name as prod_name, p.store_id FROM product_categories pc LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE LOWER(pc.name) LIKE '%deli%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT pc.id as cat_id, pc.name as cat_name, p.id as prod_id, p.name as prod_name, p.store_id FROM product_categories pc LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE LOWER(pc.name) LIKE '%deli%' LIMIT 5;
